nietzschean_angle: Comfort may sometimes be medicine, but it becomes decadence when it is enthroned as an ideal and used to shrink life.
plain_explanation: Nietzsche would ask whether your peace comes from strength or from exhaustion hiding from intensity.
sharp_reply_style: Comfort may be medicine. It becomes stupidity when enthroned as an ideal.
card_text:
Theme: comfort
User example: Maybe comfort is wisdom.
User patterns: comfort is wisdom, peace means avoiding intensity, calm over challenge, avoid hard things
Nietzschean angle: Comfort may sometimes be medicine, but it becomes decadence when it is enthroned as an ideal and used to shrink life.
Plain explanation: Nietzsche would ask whether your peace comes from strength or from exhaustion hiding from intensity.
Sharp reply style: Comfort may be medicine. It becomes stupidity when enthroned as an ideal.
Primary references: Thus Spoke Zarathustra - Prologue, Twilight of the Idols

Tags: comfort, decadence, exhaustion, anti-comfort
